title: Error: failed to connect: dial tcp [::1]:54483: connect: connection refused
body:
### Issue Description

执行podman info失败并报错。

### Steps to reproduce the issue

在控制台执行podman info

### Describe the results you received

Error: failed to connect: dial tcp [::1]:54483: connect: connection refused

### Describe the results you expected

不应该报error

### podman info output

```yaml
Error: failed to connect: dial tcp [::1]:54483: connect: connection refused
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

在mac 12.6.6 (21G646)，补充一下，我用的是podman version 4.5.0

### Additional information

无
